mapper.select: select m.mname as "mname", fr.FRID AS "frid", fr.REQ_ID AS "req_id" ,fr.RECEIVER_ID AS "receiver_id", fr.STATUS AS "status",to_char(fr.FRDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "frdate" FROM FRIEND_REQ fr, MEMBER m WHERE fr.req_id = m.MID and receiver_id = #{mid} and status = 'pending'
mapper.update: update friend_req set status = #{status} where frid = #{frid}
mapper.select: select m.* from friend_req f join member m on f.req_id = m.mid where f.receiver_id = #{mid} and f.status = 'accepted' union select m.* from friend_req f join member m on f.receiver_id = m.mid where f.req_id = #{mid} and f.status = 'accepted'
select count(*) from friend_req where req_id = #{req_id} and receiver_id = #{receiver_id}
mapper.update: update friend_req set status = 'pending' , frdate = sysdate where req_id = #{req_id} and receiver_id = #{receiver_id}
